2603.26378.title: Generative Modeling in Protein Design: Neural Representations, Conditional Generation, and Evaluation Standards
2603.26378.paper_summary: Generative modeling has become a central paradigm in protein research, extending machine learning beyond structure prediction toward sequence design, backbone generation, inverse folding, and biomolecular interaction modeling. However, the literature remains fragmented across representations, model classes, and task formulations, making it difficult to compare methods or identify appropriate evaluation standards. This survey provides a systematic synthesis of generative AI in protein research, organized around (i) foundational representations spanning sequence, geometric, and multimodal encodings; (ii) generative architectures including $\mathrm{SE}(3)$-equivariant diffusion, flow matching, and hybrid predictor-generator systems; and (iii) task settings from structure prediction and de novo design to protein-ligand and protein-protein interactions. Beyond cataloging methods, we compare assumptions, conditioning mechanisms, and controllability, and we synthesize evaluation best practices that emphasize leakage-aware splits, physical validity checks, and function-oriented benchmarks. We conclude with critical open challenges: modeling conformational dynamics and intrinsically disordered regions, scaling to large assemblies while maintaining efficiency, and developing robust safety frameworks for dual-use biosecurity risks. By unifying architectural advances with practical evaluation standards and responsible development considerations, this survey aims to accelerate the transition from predictive modeling to reliable, function-driven protein engineering.
2603.26378.paper_summary_zh: 生成模型已成為蛋白質研究中的核心範式，將機器學習的應用從結構預測擴展到序列設計、主鏈生成、逆摺疊和生物分子互動建模。<lb/>然而，文獻在表示法、模型類別和任務形式上仍然支離破碎，這使得比較方法或識別適當的評估標準變得困難。<lb/>本調查提供了對蛋白質研究中生成 AI 的系統綜合，組織圍繞以下三個方面：(i) 基礎表示法，涵蓋序列、幾何和多模態編碼；(ii) 生成架構，包括 $\mathrm{SE}(3)$-等變擴散、流匹配和混合預測-生成系統；以及 (iii) 從結構預測和新穎設計到蛋白質-配體和蛋白質-蛋白質互動的任務設置。<lb/>除了對方法進行目錄編制外，我們還比較了假設、條件機制和可控性，並綜合了強調泄漏意識拆分、物理有效性檢查和功能導向基準的評估最佳實踐。<lb/>我們以關鍵的開放挑戰作結：建模構象動力學和內在無序區域、在保持效率的同時擴展到大型組合體，以及為雙重用途生物安全風險開發穩健的安全框架。<lb/>通過將架構進展與實際評估標準和負責任的發展考量統一，本調查旨在加速從預測建模到可靠、功能驅動的蛋白質工程的過渡。
2603.26378.author: Senura Hansaja Wanasekara et.al.
2603.26378.authors: Senura Hansaja Wanasekara, Minh-Duong Nguyen, Xiaochen Liu, Nguyen H. Tran, Ken-Tye Yong
